name: io.github.notionhq/notion-mcp-server
description: Official Notion MCP server — search, read, and manage Notion pages, databases, and blocks

tools.name: notion_search
tools.description: Search across Notion pages and databases

tools.name: notion_read_page
tools.description: Read the content of a Notion page

tools.name: notion_create_page
tools.description: Create a new page in Notion

tools.name: notion_update_page
tools.description: Update properties of a Notion page

tools.name: notion_query_database
tools.description: Query a Notion database with filters
